caption: A man in a maroon long-sleeved shirt and glasses speaks into a microphone, gesturing with his left hand. He stands on a stage in front of a bright white and green backdrop that features yellow Tamil text, including the phrase "தைப்போம்!". To his left stands another man wearing a white short-sleeved button-down shirt and a lanyard around his neck, who looks toward the speaker. Behind them are red and white chairs and a yellow-legged table. As the sequence progresses, the speaker continues to gesture while talking into the microphone. In the final frames, a portion of another person wearing white clothing becomes visible on the far right side of the stage. The backdrop also displays the year ".2021" on the left side. The scene remains consistent in setting and lighting throughout the short clip.
